headline: US stocks: Will Mag 7 earnings be make-or-break for market rally?
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed heading into Monday's closing bell as investors gear up for an eventful trading week: Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Meta Platforms (META), and Microsoft (MSFT) are all scheduled to report quarterly earnings results throughout this week. How could the performances of these Magnificent Seven stocks weigh on the broader market rally seen in April? Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the stock moves seen in the Magnificent Seven (MAGS), the PHLX Semiconductor Index (^SOX), and the tech sector at large.

content.title: US stocks: Will Mag 7 earnings be make-or-break for market rally?
content.description:
US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed heading into Monday's closing bell as investors gear up for an eventful trading week: Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Meta Platforms (META), and Microsoft (MSFT) are all scheduled to report quarterly earnings results throughout this week.

How could the performances of these Magnificent Seven stocks weigh on the broader market rally seen in April?

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the stock moves seen in the Magnificent Seven (MAGS), the PHLX Semiconductor Index (^SOX), and the tech sector at large.

headline: Nvidia’s (NVDA) Explosive Run May See Limits Going Forward, Warns JPMorgan
summary: Chipmaker Nvidia (NVDA) has seen a strong rally recently, but not everyone on Wall Street believes it can keep going at the same pace. Indeed, JPMorgan (JPM) strategist Mislav Matejka said he still likes semiconductor stocks and remains positive on the group, but he also warned that the market may not behave the same way it did last year. While Nvidia surged about 120% over a six-month stretch in 2025 after a weak first quarter, Matejka believes that the conditions for another similar run are no
